subcodes.title: Words to Latimer, Esslemont, Randall et al, spoken on 1919-11-20
subcodes.first_line: A group should come together every nineteen days. It is not optional, it is incumbent on them. In every city they should do this.... these Houses of Justice will not be in every village but only in the large cities
subcodes.subjects: @House of Justice, @the economic problem and its solution; voluntary giving, @elections, @Nineteen-Day Feast, @music and singing
